Gemini
New notebook

Conversation with Gemini

You said

it should be like doodle and old computer texts and choose yourself about colour but it should be elegent and aesthetic

Gemini said

This direction is going to look incredibly unique. Combining a hand-drawn doodle aesthetic with old computer text (retro terminal/monospace style) gives it a perfect "lo-fi indie developer" vibe.

For the colors, let's go with an elegant, muted "Crimson Oatmeal" palette: a very soft, natural half-white linen color for the background, deep charcoal for clean contrast, and a muted cherry crimson accent that feels classic rather than overwhelming.

Here is your updated, fully custom index.html code.

The Retro-Doodle Blueprint:

  • The Fonts: We are using "VT323" (the ultimate classic 8-bit computer font) for headings and titles, and "Fira Code" (a clean, modern monospace programming font) for descriptions and tags.

  • The Elements: Borders look rough and sketched, buttons look like keyboard keys or hand-drawn boxes, and the page features subtle dashed lines to look like graph paper.

Copy and paste this code into your index.html inside VS Code:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Retro-Doodle Workspace</title>
    
    <!-- Google Fonts: VT323 (Old Computer text) and Fira Code (Monospace text) -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;600&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* --- Elegant Muted Retro Palette --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F5F2EB;       /* Elegant Warm Oatmeal / Soft Off-White */
            --text-main: #2D2D2D;      /* Soft Charcoal (Vintage computer ink) */
            --accent-crimson: #BA3C44; /* Muted, elegant Cherry Red */
            --accent-ink: #5C6B73;     /* Blueprint blue-grey secondary accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
        }

        nav a:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Decorative "tape" effect on top of the hero box */
        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(186, 60, 68, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: all 0.15s ease-out;
        }

        .card:hover {
            transform: translate(-3px, -3px);
            box-shadow: 9px 9px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #444;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #1E1E1E; /* Dark vintage monitor block for contact */
            color: #A9B1D6;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: #FF79C6;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: #50FA7B;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #8BE9FD;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed #8BE9FD;
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(139, 233, 253, 0.1);
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="container">
        <!-- Header Nav -->
        <header>
            <div class="logo">ROOT@CREATIVE_SYS:~</div>
            <nav>
                <a href="#projects">// projects</a>
                <a href="#about">// about</a>
                <a href="#terminal">// contact</a>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <!-- Main Bio Screen -->
        <section class="hero" id="about">
            <div class="hero-text">
                <div class="system-prompt">> INITIALIZING PROFILE... SUCCESS.</div>
                <h1>HELLO WORLD, I'M ALEX!</h1>
                <p>I specialize in bridging the gap between raw programmatic structure and custom interactive visuals. I spend my time engineering clean code setups, tinkering with automated background mechanics, and building digital art layouts.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-avatar">
                <div class="avatar-placeholder">[ _PHOTO.EXE ]</div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Works Content -->
        <section id="projects">
            <h2 class="section-title">SELECTED_MODULES</h2>
            
            <div class="grid">
                <!-- Project 1 -->
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/app/01</span>
                    <h3>VISUAL_FRAMEWORK</h3>
                    <p>A sleek, lightweight software composition emphasizing lightning-fast background operations paired with clean text grids.</p>
                    <span class="tag">SOFTWARE</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Project 2 -->
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/web/02</span>
                    <h3>INTERACTIVE_NODE</h3>
                    <p>An custom interface exploration proving how minimal design parameters and monospace spacing build clean user workspaces.</p>
                    <span class="tag">UI/UX</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Project 3 -->
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/bot/03</span>
                    <h3>AUTOMATION_SCRIPT</h3>
                    <p>A core background script deployed to manage complex processes effortlessly, controlled entirely via minimal visual outputs.</p>
                    <span class="tag">BOTS / STACK</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Terminal Contact Box -->
        <footer id="terminal">
            <h2>EXEC CONTACT_ROUTINE</h2>
            <div class="console-text">alex_sys login: guest_user<br>> Establishing connection stream... open.</div>
            <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem;">Have a project proposal, application idea, or want to deploy something collaborative together?</p>
            <a href="mailto:your-email@example.com" class="btn-link">./connect.sh</a>
        </footer>
    </div>

</body>
</html>

Save this in VS Code and view it in your browser. It hits that precise intersection of sophisticated web art and charming retro computer terminal design. Let me know what you think of the color balance and the font setup!

You said

add ssome animation moves while draggind and moving and touching

Gemini said

To make the portfolio feel truly interactive, organic, and alive when you touch, hover, or drag things, we can use CSS animations and transitions.

Since standard HTML elements don't naturally "drag" smoothly without heavy JavaScript, we can achieve an incredible, elastic "squish and pop" physical effect using pure CSS. When you hover, touch, or click the cards, they will tilt, lift up, and expand fluidly—making it feel like you are pressing down on a real, springy sketchpad button.

Here is the updated code block. Replace everything inside your <style> tags with this version to add the smooth movement animations:

CSS
        /* --- Core Theme Settings --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F5F2EB;       /* Elegant Warm Oatmeal / Soft Off-White */
            --text-main: #2D2D2D;      /* Soft Charcoal (Vintage computer ink) */
            --accent-crimson: #BA3C44; /* Muted, elegant Cherry Red */
            --accent-ink: #5C6B73;     /* Blueprint blue-grey secondary accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg);
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        nav a:hover, nav a:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
            /* Elastic slide-in on load */
            animation: containerEntry 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.2) forwards;
        }

        /* Decorative "tape" effect on top of the hero box */
        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(186, 60, 68, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: grab;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.5), box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        /* Simulates dragging/moving physical response when touched/clicked */
        .hero-avatar:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
            transform: scale(0.92) rotate(4deg) translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            /* Smooth transitions for moving, hovering, and lifting */
            transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), 
                        box-shadow 0.25s ease, 
                        border-color 0.25s ease;
        }

        /* Lift and float reaction on Hover/Touch */
        .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg);
            box-shadow: 12px 12px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        /* Squish and compress down on active Click/Press */
        .card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.96) rotate(1deg);
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #444;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #1E1E1E; /* Dark vintage monitor block for contact */
            color: #A9B1D6;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        footer:hover {
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: #FF79C6;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: #50FA7B;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #8BE9FD;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed #8BE9FD;
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(139, 233, 253, 0.15);
            transform: scale(1.05);
            border-style: solid;
        }
        
        .btn-link:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        /* --- Keyframes for Entry Loading Animations --- */
        @keyframes containerEntry {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.98);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }

Try it out in your browser:

  • Hover / Slide: Move your mouse over the cards. They will smoothly slide up, tilt sideways, and cast a larger crimson sketch shadow.

  • Touch / Click: Hold your click down or tap-and-hold on mobile over the card or the [ _PHOTO.EXE ] box. It completely drops its shadow, slightly shrinks, and shifts layout as if you just manually pushed it into the desk surface.

You said

gimme as whole, i should replace whole code

Gemini said

Here is the complete, single-file code ready to be pasted directly into your index.html file in VS Code.

Select everything inside your current file, delete it, and replace it entirely with this:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Retro-Doodle Workspace</title>
    
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;600&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* --- Elegant Muted Retro Palette --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F5F2EB;       /* Elegant Warm Oatmeal / Soft Off-White */
            --text-main: #2D2D2D;      /* Soft Charcoal (Vintage computer ink) */
            --accent-crimson: #BA3C44; /* Muted, elegant Cherry Red */
            --accent-ink: #5C6B73;     /* Blueprint blue-grey secondary accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg);
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        nav a:hover, nav a:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
            /* Elastic slide-in on load */
            animation: containerEntry 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.2) forwards;
        }

        /* Decorative "tape" effect on top of the hero box */
        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(186, 60, 68, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: grab;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.5), box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        /* Simulates dragging/moving physical response when touched/clicked */
        .hero-avatar:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
            transform: scale(0.92) rotate(4deg) translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            /* Smooth transitions for moving, hovering, and lifting */
            transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), 
                        box-shadow 0.25s ease, 
                        border-color 0.25s ease;
        }

        /* Lift and float reaction on Hover/Touch */
        .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg);
            box-shadow: 12px 12px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        /* Squish and compress down on active Click/Press */
        .card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.96) rotate(1deg);
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #444;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #1E1E1E; /* Dark vintage monitor block for contact */
            color: #A9B1D6;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        footer:hover {
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: #FF79C6;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: #50FA7B;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #8BE9FD;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed #8BE9FD;
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(139, 233, 253, 0.15);
            transform: scale(1.05);
            border-style: solid;
        }
        
        .btn-link:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        /* --- Keyframes for Entry Loading Animations --- */
        @keyframes containerEntry {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.98);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="container">
        <header>
            <div class="logo">ROOT@CREATIVE_SYS:~</div>
            <nav>
                <a href="#projects">// projects</a>
                <a href="#about">// about</a>
                <a href="#terminal">// contact</a>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <section class="hero" id="about">
            <div class="hero-text">
                <div class="system-prompt">> INITIALIZING PROFILE... SUCCESS.</div>
                <h1>HELLO WORLD, I'M ALEX!</h1>
                <p>I specialize in bridging the gap between raw programmatic structure and custom interactive visuals. I spend my time engineering clean code setups, tinkering with automated background mechanics, and building digital art layouts.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-avatar">
                <div class="avatar-placeholder">[ _PHOTO.EXE ]</div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section id="projects">
            <h2 class="section-title">SELECTED_MODULES</h2>
            
            <div class="grid">
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/app/01</span>
                    <h3>VISUAL_FRAMEWORK</h3>
                    <p>A sleek, lightweight software composition emphasizing lightning-fast background operations paired with clean text grids.</p>
                    <span class="tag">SOFTWARE</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/web/02</span>
                    <h3>INTERACTIVE_NODE</h3>
                    <p>An custom interface exploration proving how minimal design parameters and monospace spacing build clean user workspaces.</p>
                    <span class="tag">UI/UX</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/bot/03</span>
                    <h3>AUTOMATION_SCRIPT</h3>
                    <p>A core background script deployed to manage complex processes effortlessly, controlled entirely via minimal visual outputs.</p>
                    <span class="tag">BOTS / STACK</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <footer id="terminal">
            <h2>EXEC CONTACT_ROUTINE</h2>
            <div class="console-text">alex_sys login: guest_user<br>> Establishing connection stream... open.</div>
            <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem;">Have a project proposal, application idea, or want to deploy something collaborative together?</p>
            <a href="mailto:your-email@example.com" class="btn-link">./connect.sh</a>
        </footer>
    </div>

</body>
</html>

Save the file, open it up in your browser, and give those cards a hover and press to see the animations in action!

You said

while moving cursor there should be some effectc

Gemini said

To get a true cursor-following effect where trail elements or custom shapes follow your mouse movement across the screen, we need to introduce a tiny bit of JavaScript.

Since our theme is a retro-doodle sketchbook, let's add a trail of tiny trailing digital "sparkles" or "crosshairs" that follow your cursor as you glide across the grid paper.

Here is the updated whole file. Replace everything in your index.html file with this version. I've added a clean script at the very bottom that spawns small doodle-dots whenever the mouse moves!

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Retro-Doodle Workspace</title>
    
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;600&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* --- Elegant Muted Retro Palette --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F5F2EB;       /* Elegant Warm Oatmeal / Soft Off-White */
            --text-main: #2D2D2D;      /* Soft Charcoal (Vintage computer ink) */
            --accent-crimson: #BA3C44; /* Muted, elegant Cherry Red */
            --accent-ink: #5C6B73;     /* Blueprint blue-grey secondary accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* --- Cursor Sparkle Particle Style --- */
        .cursor-particle {
            position: fixed;
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--accent-crimson);
            border-radius: 50%;
            pointer-events: none; /* Stops it from blocking clicks */
            z-index: 9999;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            animation: particleFade 0.6s ease-out forwards;
        }

        @keyframes particleFade {
            0% {
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
                opacity: 0.8;
            }
            100% {
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.2);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg);
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        nav a:hover, nav a:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
            animation: containerEntry 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.2) forwards;
        }

        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(186, 60, 68, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: grab;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.5), box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .hero-avatar:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
            transform: scale(0.92) rotate(4deg) translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), 
                        box-shadow 0.25s ease, 
                        border-color 0.25s ease;
        }

        .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg);
            box-shadow: 12px 12px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        .card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.96) rotate(1deg);
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #444;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #1E1E1E;
            color: #A9B1D6;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        footer:hover {
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: #FF79C6;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: #50FA7B;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #8BE9FD;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed #8BE9FD;
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(139, 233, 253, 0.15);
            transform: scale(1.05);
            border-style: solid;
        }
        
        .btn-link:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        @keyframes containerEntry {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.98);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="container">
        <header>
            <div class="logo">ROOT@CREATIVE_SYS:~</div>
            <nav>
                <a href="#projects">// projects</a>
                <a href="#about">// about</a>
                <a href="#terminal">// contact</a>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <section class="hero" id="about">
            <div class="hero-text">
                <div class="system-prompt">> INITIALIZING PROFILE... SUCCESS.</div>
                <h1>HELLO WORLD, I'M ALEX!</h1>
                <p>I specialize in bridging the gap between raw programmatic structure and custom interactive visuals. I spend my time engineering clean code setups, tinkering with automated background mechanics, and building digital art layouts.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-avatar">
                <div class="avatar-placeholder">[ _PHOTO.EXE ]</div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section id="projects">
            <h2 class="section-title">SELECTED_MODULES</h2>
            
            <div class="grid">
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/app/01</span>
                    <h3>VISUAL_FRAMEWORK</h3>
                    <p>A sleek, lightweight software composition emphasizing lightning-fast background operations paired with clean text grids.</p>
                    <span class="tag">SOFTWARE</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/web/02</span>
                    <h3>INTERACTIVE_NODE</h3>
                    <p>An custom interface exploration proving how minimal design parameters and monospace spacing build clean user workspaces.</p>
                    <span class="tag">UI/UX</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/bot/03</span>
                    <h3>AUTOMATION_SCRIPT</h3>
                    <p>A core background script deployed to manage complex processes effortlessly, controlled entirely via minimal visual outputs.</p>
                    <span class="tag">BOTS / STACK</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <footer id="terminal">
            <h2>EXEC CONTACT_ROUTINE</h2>
            <div class="console-text">alex_sys login: guest_user<br>> Establishing connection stream... open.</div>
            <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem;">Have a project proposal, application idea, or want to deploy something collaborative together?</p>
            <a href="mailto:your-email@example.com" class="btn-link">./connect.sh</a>
        </footer>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Listens for cursor movement to spawn doodle trail dots
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
            const particle = document.createElement('div');
            particle.classList.add('cursor-particle');
            
            // Positions the circle right under the mouse pointer coordinates
            particle.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
            particle.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
            
            // Randomly variations in sizing for organic doodle look
            const randomSize = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8) + 4;
            particle.style.width = randomSize + 'px';
            particle.style.height = randomSize + 'px';
            
            // Random color picking between charcoal and crimson trail particles
            const colors = ['#BA3C44', '#2D2D2D', '#5C6B73'];
            particle.style.background = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];

            document.body.appendChild(particle);
            
            // Cleans up the particle after the animation completes
            setTimeout(() => {
                particle.remove();
            }, 600);
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>

Save the file and wiggle your mouse anywhere on the page—you’ll see a soft, interactive lo-fi particle stream painting your screen as you navigate!

You said

should i replace existing code by this

Gemini said

Yes, absolutely! Select everything currently inside your file, delete it entirely, and paste this new code in. The new version contains the exact same structure and beautiful "Crimson Oatmeal" color scheme we built, but it seamlessly adds the mouse-trail effect right into it.

Once you replace the code and save it, refresh your browser tab and wiggle your mouse—you'll see the magic happen! Let me know if the trail looks as cool as you imagined.

You said

change aesthetic colour

Gemini said

Let's change up the color palette! Since we are keeping that sophisticated, elegant doodle-terminal look, we can swap the colors out for a different aesthetic vibe.

Here are three gorgeous, custom color combinations to choose from. Pick your favorite, and I'll give you the exact replacement code block!

Option A: "Matcha Latte & Ink" (Calm & Organic)

A serene, deeply aesthetic vibe that feels like a clean notebook in a botanical garden.

  • Background: Soft Cream-White (#F7F5F0)

  • Primary Accent: Rich Matcha Green (#556B2F)

  • Secondary Accent: Muted Sage (#8A9A86)

  • Text/Borders: Deep Ink Charcoal (#242625)

Option B: "Midnight Indigo & Neon Lemon" (High Contrast Retro)

A dark, ultra-sleek layout that gives off cool, late-night lo-fi workstation energy.

  • Background: Deep Midnight Navy (#161925)

  • Primary Accent: Vibrant Lemon Yellow (#F4D068)

  • Secondary Accent: Soft Lavender Blue (#7A86B6)

  • Text/Borders: Off-White (#EBF1F5) and Pale Ice Cards (#1F2336)

Option C: "Terracotta & Soft Clay" (Warm Earthy Minimalist)

An elegant, earthy look that feels like a modern premium design studio's portfolio.

  • Background: Pale Warm Clay (#F4EFEA)

  • Primary Accent: Burnt Terracotta (#C26D5C)

  • Secondary Accent: Dusty Mustard (#D1A153)

  • Text/Borders: Dark Earth Brown (#332C2A)

Which color direction feels right for your space? Once you pick, we'll swap it out!

You said

try option c

Gemini said

Option C is an incredibly elegant choice! The burnt terracotta and soft clay combination gives the entire page a warm, artistic, high-end studio feel while keeping that playful retro-computer terminal vibe.

Here is your updated, complete index.html file with the Terracotta & Soft Clay aesthetic fully applied.

Select everything in your VS Code file, clear it, and replace it with this:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Retro-Doodle Workspace</title>
    
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;600&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* --- Option C: Terracotta & Soft Clay Palette --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F4EFEA;       /* Pale Warm Clay Background */
            --text-main: #332C2A;      /* Dark Earth Brown for borders and main text */
            --accent-crimson: #C26D5C; /* Burnt Terracotta Core Accent */
            --accent-ink: #D1A153;     /* Dusty Mustard Secondary Accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(51, 44, 42, 0.05) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* --- Cursor Sparkle Particle Style --- */
        .cursor-particle {
            position: fixed;
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            animation: particleFade 0.6s ease-out forwards;
        }

        @keyframes particleFade {
            0% {
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
                opacity: 0.8;
            }
            100% {
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.2);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg);
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        nav a:hover, nav a:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
            animation: containerEntry 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.2) forwards;
        }

        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(194, 109, 92, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: grab;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.5), box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .hero-avatar:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
            transform: scale(0.92) rotate(4deg) translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), 
                        box-shadow 0.25s ease, 
                        border-color 0.25s ease;
        }

        .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg);
            box-shadow: 12px 12px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        .card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.96) rotate(1deg);
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #554e4c;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #2D2522; /* Deep Earth Espresso block for vintage contrast */
            color: #ECE5E2;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        footer:hover {
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #F4EFEA;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed var(--accent-crimson);
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(194, 109, 92, 0.15);
            transform: scale(1.05);
            border-style: solid;
        }
        
        .btn-link:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        @keyframes containerEntry {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.98);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="container">
        <header>
            <div class="logo">ROOT@CREATIVE_SYS:~</div>
            <nav>
                <a href="#projects">// projects</a>
                <a href="#about">// about</a>
                <a href="#terminal">// contact</a>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <section class="hero" id="about">
            <div class="hero-text">
                <div class="system-prompt">> INITIALIZING PROFILE... SUCCESS.</div>
                <h1>HELLO WORLD, I'M ALEX!</h1>
                <p>I specialize in bridging the gap between raw programmatic structure and custom interactive visuals. I spend my time engineering clean code setups, tinkering with automated background mechanics, and building digital art layouts.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-avatar">
                <div class="avatar-placeholder">[ _PHOTO.EXE ]</div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section id="projects">
            <h2 class="section-title">SELECTED_MODULES</h2>
            
            <div class="grid">
                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/app/01</span>
                    <h3>VISUAL_FRAMEWORK</h3>
                    <p>A sleek, lightweight software composition emphasizing lightning-fast background operations paired with clean text grids.</p>
                    <span class="tag">SOFTWARE</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/web/02</span>
                    <h3>INTERACTIVE_NODE</h3>
                    <p>An custom interface exploration proving how minimal design parameters and monospace spacing build clean user workspaces.</p>
                    <span class="tag">UI/UX</span>
                </div>

                <div class="card">
                    <span class="card-header-code">src/bot/03</span>
                    <h3>AUTOMATION_SCRIPT</h3>
                    <p>A core background script deployed to manage complex processes effortlessly, controlled entirely via minimal visual outputs.</p>
                    <span class="tag">BOTS / STACK</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <footer id="terminal">
            <h2>EXEC CONTACT_ROUTINE</h2>
            <div class="console-text">alex_sys login: guest_user<br>> Establishing connection stream... open.</div>
            <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem;">Have a project proposal, application idea, or want to deploy something collaborative together?</p>
            <a href="mailto:your-email@example.com" class="btn-link">./connect.sh</a>
        </footer>
    </div>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
            const particle = document.createElement('div');
            particle.classList.add('cursor-particle');
            
            particle.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
            particle.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
            
            const randomSize = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8) + 4;
            particle.style.width = randomSize + 'px';
            particle.style.height = randomSize + 'px';
            
            // Particles match our beautiful clay and terracotta tones
            const colors = ['#C26D5C', '#332C2A', '#D1A153'];
            particle.style.background = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];

            document.body.appendChild(particle);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                particle.remove();
            }, 600);
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>

Save it, refresh your tab, and see how the warm earthy tones bring out a totally different, ultra-elegant vibe! Do you want to start customizing the text with your actual project details now?

You said

cursor move like sparkle or something mild and aesthetic

Gemini said

To give your cursor trail a softer, much more aesthetic and floaty "sparkle" effect rather than solid dots, we can change the particles into elegant, soft-glowing star asterisks (★ or ✦) or diamond shapes that slowly rotate, fade, and drift downward as you glide across the clay background.

Here is the updated script section with an ultra-mild, starry aesthetic.

What changes:

  • The Shape: It now spawns delicate, mini twinkling starburst shapes (✦) instead of round dots.

  • The Motion: The sparkles don't just sit there; they drift slightly down and sideways organically, mimicking a soft trail of dust or magic.

  • The Glow: A subtle fade-and-shrink scale makes them disappear smoothly.

Instead of copying the whole file again, you can just find the <script> tag at the very bottom of your index.html file and replace it entirely with this new one:

HTML
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
            const particle = document.createElement('div');
            
            // Assigning the starburst character as our doodle sparkle
            particle.innerHTML = '✦';
            particle.style.position = 'fixed';
            particle.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
            particle.style.zIndex = '9999';
            particle.style.userSelect = 'none';
            
            // Accurate cursor center placement
            particle.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
            particle.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
            
            // Pick a mild aesthetic font size for the sparkles
            const randomSize = Math.floor(Math.random() * 12) + 8;
            particle.style.fontSize = randomSize + 'px';
            
            // Match the Option C aesthetic terracotta and mustard tones
            const colors = ['#C26D5C', '#D1A153', '#A89F91'];
            particle.style.color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
            
            // Add a soft CSS animation directly to the sparkle
            particle.style.transition = 'transform 0.6s ease-out, opacity 0.6s ease-out';
            
            // Slight initial rotation offset
            const initialRotation = Math.floor(Math.random() * 360);
            particle.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${initialRotation}deg) scale(1)`;
            particle.style.opacity = '0.7';

            document.body.appendChild(particle);
            
            // Animate the sparkle movement on the next frame
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                // Creates a mild, floating drift downward and to a random side
                const driftX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30;
                const driftY = Math.random() * 25 + 15; 
                const finalRotation = initialRotation + (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 90 : -90);
                
                particle.style.transform = `translate(calc(-50% + ${driftX}px), calc(-50% + ${driftY}px)) rotate(${finalRotation}deg) scale(0.3)`;
                particle.style.opacity = '0';
            });
            
            // Automatically clear out the sparkle from memory
            setTimeout(() => {
                particle.remove();
            }, 600);
        });
    </script>

Try it out:

Save the file, refresh your page, and move the mouse around. It will leave behind a beautiful, gentle trail of tiny terracotta and golden stars that softly drift down like aesthetic stardust before disappearing! Let me know if that hits the mild vibe you were aiming for.

You said

hy its look plain, gimme as whole code to be replaced

Gemini said

That completely white screen happens because when we updated just the sparkle script in the last step, the rest of the HTML webpage structure got accidentally left out! Don't worry at all—it's an incredibly easy fix.

Here is the entire, complete code combining the elegant Terracotta & Soft Clay palette, the doodle terminal layout, the smooth card animations, and the mild floating star sparkles all wrapped into one file.

Select everything inside your index.html file, delete it completely, and paste this whole block in:

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Retro-Doodle Workspace</title>
    
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;600&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* --- Option C: Terracotta & Soft Clay Palette --- */
        :root {
            --bg-color: #F4EFEA;       /* Pale Warm Clay Background */
            --text-main: #332C2A;      /* Dark Earth Brown for borders and main text */
            --accent-crimson: #C26D5C; /* Burnt Terracotta Core Accent */
            --accent-ink: #D1A153;     /* Dusty Mustard Secondary Accent */
            --card-bg: #FFFFFF;        /* Pure card white */
            
            /* Rough, asymmetrical hand-drawn border effect */
            --doodle-border: 3px solid var(--text-main);
            --doodle-radius: 255px 20px 225px 30px/30px 225px 20px 255px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            /* Subtle background grid pattern mimicking a developer's sketchbook */
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(51, 44, 42, 0.05) 1px, transparent 0);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* --- Header / Terminal Nav --- */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            font-weight: normal;
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg);
        }

        nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-left: 1.5rem;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
            border: 2px dashed transparent;
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        nav a:hover, nav a:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            background: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* --- Hero Sketchbox --- */
        .hero {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            align-items: center;
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
            box-shadow: 7px 7px 0px var(--text-main);
            position: relative;
            animation: containerEntry 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.2) forwards;
        }

        .hero::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            background: rgba(194, 109, 92, 0.15);
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
            border-left: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            border-right: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }

        .hero-text h1 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 4rem;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .system-prompt {
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .hero-avatar {
            width: 220px;
            height: 220px;
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: grab;
            transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.5), box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .hero-avatar:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
            transform: scale(0.92) rotate(4deg) translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .avatar-placeholder {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
        }

        /* --- Section Header --- */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--text-main);
            border-bottom: 3px dashed var(--text-main);
            padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        /* --- Custom Grid Layout --- */
        .grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 5rem;
        }

        .card {
            background: var(--card-bg);
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            padding: 1.8rem;
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), 
                        box-shadow 0.25s ease, 
                        border-color 0.25s ease;
        }

        .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg);
            box-shadow: 12px 12px 0px var(--accent-crimson);
            border-color: var(--accent-crimson);
        }

        .card:active {
            transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.96) rotate(1deg);
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px var(--text-main);
        }

        .card-header-code {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .card h3 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .card p {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #554e4c;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--text-main);
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            background: #FFF;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* --- Terminal / Footer Area --- */
        footer {
            border: var(--doodle-border);
            background: #2D2522; /* Deep Earth Espresso block for vintage contrast */
            color: #ECE5E2;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--doodle-radius);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--text-main);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        footer:hover {
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        footer h2 {
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: normal;
            color: var(--accent-crimson);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .console-text {
            color: var(--accent-ink);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .btn-link {
            display: inline-block;
            color: #F4EFEA;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 2px dashed var(--accent-crimson);
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            background: rgba(194, 109, 92, 0.15);
            transform: scale(1.05);
            border-style: solid;
        }
        
        .btn-link:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        @keyframes containerEntry {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.98);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
            .hero-avatar { justify-self: center; }
            header { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
            nav a { margin: 0 0.5rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="container">
        <header>
            <div class="logo">ROOT@CREATIVE_SYS:~</div>
            <nav>
                <a href="#projects">// projects</a>
                <a href="#about">// about</a>
                <a href="#terminal">// contact</a>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <section class="hero" id="about">
            <div class="hero-text">
                <div class="system-prompt">> INITIALIZING PROFILE... SUCCESS.</div>
                <h1>HELLO WORLD, I'M ALEX!</h1>
                <p>I specialize in bridging the gap between raw programmatic structure and custom interactive visuals. I spend my time engineering clean code setups, tinkering with automated background mechanics, and building digital art layouts.</p>
            </div>
